description: K8s audit-style events with 80% verb=get, 20% verb=post — find_skew should detect verb slot dominance ≥ 0.6.

expected.rubric: Tool should detect that one of the slots has a dominant value at or above 0.6. With 8 events having verb=get and 2 having verb=post in a uniform field set, this is a clear skew case. Expect findings.length >= 1 and the top finding's skewedSlots[0].dominantPct around 0.7-1.0.
